TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Marino_Riccardi, title = Marino_Riccardi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marino_Riccardi} }

S.FORM: Marino Riccardi ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 7, Marino Riccardi, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1958) mrhuw San marino ta' misuw hya' ga Marino Riccardi, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Marino Riccardi ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 7, Marino Riccardi, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1958) mrhuw San marino ta' misuw hya' ga Marino Riccardi, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: marino riʦ~ʨʦ~ʨar*i rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, marino riʦ~ʨʦ~ʨar*i, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw s~ɕan marino taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa marino riʦ~ʨʦ~ʨar*i, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
